tool_args: SELECT date_hst, name, island, rainfall_mm, rainfall_inches FROM mv_daily_station_summary JOIN mesonet_stations WHERE date_hst >= '2025-10-01' ORDER BY rainfall_mm DESC LIMIT 20
tool_result_summary: March 13-14 2026 dominates: Nahuku 711mm, Puuwaawaa 677mm, Kuiki 663mm, Haleakala 635mm

tool_args: SELECT date_hst, COUNT(DISTINCT station_id), AVG(rainfall_mm), MAX(rainfall_mm), SUM(rainfall_mm) FROM mv_daily_station_summary WHERE date_hst BETWEEN '2026-03-10' AND '2026-03-18' GROUP BY date_hst
tool_result_summary: March 14: avg 174.6mm/station (30x normal), 12,917mm total across network. Sharp onset March 13, back to normal by March 16.

tool_args: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_hst), AVG(rainfall_mm), MAX(rainfall_mm) FROM mv_daily_station_summary WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_hst)=3 GROUP BY year
tool_result_summary: Revealed 2023 has anomalous max of 1,007,874mm — traced to station 0115 sensor error
